CHARACTERS (use reference sheet for exact appearance):

generations.content_context: The core team is leveraging product launches like Milady to drive traffic to elizacloud, which then funds the development of the ElizaOS open-source framework.    - "Start of Downtrend"  
   - "Major Price Decline"  
   - "Current Status: All-Time Lows"

CONTENT CONTEXT:
Reports of elizaOS token hitting continuous all-time lows and a 90% drop from previous highs.

STYLE: Flat design icons, isometric elements, clean visual hierarchy with labels. Professional editorial clarity.

- Clean, polished vector aesthetic
